nodes.body: This weirdness is necessary because the start run script can either be running as the desired ubuntu user or as root
should we only write this if flows are enabled? (`settings.Flows.isEnabled`)
Yeah I considered that but figured there is no downside to writing it if flows is disabled. Happy to change if you feel strongly
ive been trying to only add volumes, env vars, etc to the pod yaml (k8s config generator) if flows are enabled. but this is pretty harmless i dont feel strongly about it

I considered removing the existing file instead, but that felt less flexible in the long run. This approach will be slightly more painful in the short run as many images already have a config file baked in without a flyte console endpoint
Would users ever make their own config file modifications that we don't want to overwrite?
